title: Split Segment
description: A segment in the Split platform, representing a reusable group of identities (keys) that can be referenced in feature flag targeting rules.

name.description: Unique name of the segment within a workspace

description.description: Human-readable description of the segment's purpose

creationTime.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the segment was created

tags.description: Tags associated with the segment for organization and filtering

keys.description: Identity keys belonging to this segment

TrafficType.description: A traffic type defining the kind of entity the segment targets

id.description: Unique identifier for the traffic type

name.description: Name of the traffic type (e.g., user, account)

Tag.description: A tag used to categorize and filter segments

SegmentKey.description: An identity key belonging to a segment
